overview.description: The Return Stacked International Stocks & Managed Futures ETF (RSIT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund that uses leverage to stack total returns from two strategies. The fund manages a portfolio of developed markets ex-US equities alongside a long/short managed futures strategy. RSIT was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Return Stacked.
